projects.name: HyperFrames
projects.description_zh: 生成开场动画和短视频, 装好后 Orkas 会自动调用。
projects.description_en: Generate intro animations and short videos; Orkas uses it automatically once installed.
projects.task_zh: 帮我做一段产品开场动画
projects.task_en: Make a product intro animation for me

projects.name: Browser-Use
projects.description_zh: 让 AI 直接帮你操作浏览器、点击和填写网页。
projects.description_en: Let AI operate the browser for you - click and fill in pages.
projects.task_zh: 让 AI 帮我操作浏览器
projects.task_en: Let AI operate the browser for me

projects.name: PPT-Master
projects.description_zh: 用一段大纲或要点自动生成可编辑的 PPT 演示文稿。
projects.description_en: Generate an editable slide deck from an outline or a few bullet points.
projects.task_en: Turn my outline into a slide deck

projects.name: Crawl4AI
projects.description_zh: 抓取网页正文并整理成干净的文档或结构化数据, 装好后 Orkas 会自动调用。
projects.description_en: Extract a web page's main content into a clean document or structured data; Orkas uses it automatically once installed.
projects.task_zh: 抓取这个网页的内容整理成文档
projects.task_en: Pull this web page into a clean document
